---
title: "Call for CNG mentors and mentees"
author:
  - name: Ralph Straumann
    url: https://ralphstraumann.ch
date: "2026-04-12 18:39"
image: "tomasz-sroka-eaxgNP4cpY8-unsplash.jpg"
description: "The Cloud-Native Geospatial (#CNG) #Mentorship Program pairs geospatial professionals for six months of one-on-one career, technical, or project-focused guidance. With applications open until end of April and running from May to October, the program wants to foster knowledge-sharing within the #cloudnative community."
---

## CNG mentorship program

The [Cloud-Native Geospatial Forum][cng][^cng] promotes geospatial 
accessibility and usability, with a focus on the cloud-native 
paradigm[^cloud-native]. To this end, the CNG "create vendor-neutral events, content, and educational opportunities". 

Currently, the CNG is looking for mentors and mentees to participate in a new 
CNG mentorship program. From the [announcement][announcement]:

> The sharing of knowledge amongst members of the community helps us all 
thrive and grow (...). That is why we are launching the CNG Mentorship Pilot 
Program: a roughly six-month program that pairs geospatial professionals with 
mentees for regular one-on-one meetings to help the mentee grow in their 
career.

Mentees and mentors can be of any career stage: early, mid or senior. And the 
program has three scopes one can choose from:

- General career guidance
- Technical guidance about specific tools, methods or similar
- Project-focused guidance

The program runs from May to October and culminates in an optional in-person 
meetup in the USA. Mentees and mentors should meet at least twice a month for 
one hour on each occasion. It is not made explicit, but to me it seems obvious 
that the program is open to participants from all over the world and that 
meetings can be held virtually.

[Applications are open until 30 April 2026][announcement].

## A mentorship program for Switzerland?

I think a similar program would suit the SGS[^sgs] very well. The SGS domain 
"Building and Strengthening Skills" has (only) [one action in 2026][sgs-action]. 
And a [recent report on Switzerland's geospatial education pipeline and 
workforce][report] has found some areas of concern. Maybe a mentorship program 
could help address some of these issues.

[^cng]: CNG.
[^cloud-native]: I.e., taking full advantage of the cloud computing model; in 
the data world typically through enabling [partial downloads](https://blog.sogeo.services/blog/2023/12/29/statuscode-206-letsgetstarted.html) of file contents through so-called [HTTP range requests](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Range_requests).
[^sgs]: The [Swiss Geoinformation Strategy](https://www.geo.admin.ch/de/strategie-und-umsetzung), a national action strategy with annual action plans for the geoinformation sector in Switzerland.

[cng]: https://cloudnativegeo.org/about/
[announcement]: https://cloudnativegeo.org/blog/2026/04/introducing-the-cng-mentorship-pilot-program/
[sgs-action]: https://spatialists.ch/posts/2026/01/25-just-out-sgs-action-plan-2026/index.html
[report]: https://spatialists.ch/posts/2026/02/23-geoinformation-job-market/
